title: Eternal Jesus
description: When you get below 2 hearts, your screen will flash a picture of jesus and play the bell sound from majoras mask.
body:
This mod will flash a picture of Jesus Christ on your screen and play the bell sound from Majora's Mask to scare you when you are in a high stress situation and when you get to low health. He is waiting for you to pass on so he can take you up to the skies. The entire appeal of this mod is to let you forget about it until the moment that he appears on your screen. 

This mod is HEAVILY inspired by [invisual] on TikTok. (https://www.tiktok.com/@______invisual________?lang=en)
